summary: Applied small continuity edits to better bridge Chapter 3's promised 6:00 call and align Chapter 4's late text-thread state with Chapter 5's opening, while preserving all chapter beats and voice texture.
edits: Added one entry bridge sentence noting Eli's unanswered 6:00 call to Nora after the Chapter 3 handoff.
Shifted late-afternoon message timestamps earlier (3:42/3:50) to keep the chapter's exit thread anchored to afternoon pressure.
Inserted Nora's direct line ("You do not get to disappear and then call this confusion. Return funds today.") in the late-afternoon thread for downstream seam continuity.
Removed the later 9:13 PM text block and replaced it with a single line stating no new texts after late afternoon to clean the Chapter 4 -> 5 handoff.
